description_long: This ATM is a freestanding, rectangular kiosk with a robust, metallic exterior and a slightly angled upper section housing a digital screen. The front face features a prominent display, a card slot, and a cash dispenser, all arranged for ergonomic user access. The body is mounted on a wide, flat base plate, likely for stability and to prevent tampering or unauthorized movement. The side views reveal a solid, boxy structure with minimal external features, emphasizing security and durability. The color scheme is primarily a light beige or off-white, with some darker accents around the interactive components. The overall design is utilitarian, focusing on functionality and resistance to vandalism, suitable for placement in public urban environments.
description: A sturdy, freestanding ATM kiosk with a digital screen, card slot, and cash dispenser on a wide base, finished in light beige tones. Its design is robust and functional, ideal for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital screen, card slot, and cash dispenser, all easily accessible to users.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid, rectangular body and the angled upper section with minimal external features.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the plain, secure back panel and the wide base plate for stability.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the kiosk's boxy, tamper-resistant construction.
attribute_screen_interface: A medium-sized rectangular screen is centrally placed on the upper front face, slightly angled for user visibility. The screen appears to be touch-capable or display-only, with no visible physical buttons directly on the screen.
attribute_card_slot: A single horizontal card slot is located below the screen on the front face, with a rectangular opening and a slight recess for card insertion.
attribute_receipt_dispenser: A small rectangular slot, likely for receipts, is positioned below the card slot on the front face, with a subtle outline but no visible labeling.
